## Updates

- Reworked the application UI and navigation, with a cleaner Dataset workflow and dedicated tabs for Tag Groups, Settings, Auto Tagger, and Logs. (#20)
- Greatly improved dataset browsing performance with virtual scrolling, smoother pane resizing, and better keyboard navigation and multi-selection behaviour. (#23, #26)
- Improved tag filtering with Danbooru-style negative tags, better image filtering, and multi-filter support for tag groups. (#21)
- Reworked the settings system and added customizable keyboard shortcuts for common actions.
- Added drag-and-drop tag reordering, better undo behaviour for tag edits, and support for replacing a single tag with multiple tags. (#20, #24)
- Added richer tag chip context menus, including quick actions such as adding a tag to the image filter and opening the image in the file explorer. (#20)
- Improved the Danbooru wiki search experience and overall autocompletion behaviour across the app.
- Added and improved tools for renaming files, finding duplicate images, cropping images, and changing image background colors. (#26)
- Added full-screen image zoom and pan, improved image preview behaviour, and clearer image information while editing. (#26)
- Reworked the autotagger into its own tab and added model download progress, model deletion, custom model support, and stronger error handling. (#27, #28, #30, #31)
- Improved the tag difference sections to compare autotagger results with captions, plus quick actions such as applying all tags from a tag group. (#18, #20)
- Added support for WebP images and fixed issues where edited images could remain locked after processing.
- Added packaged Linux builds and improved how the bundled tagger runtime is managed across Windows and Linux installations. (#25)
- Improved release packaging and update distribution support for packaged builds.
- Polished themes, alerts, logs, and general UX throughout the application. (#20, #22)

## Download Options

| Platform | File | Type | Automatic Updates |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Windows | `.exe` | Installer | Yes |
| Windows | `.zip` | Portable | No |
| Linux | `.AppImage` | Portable application | Yes |
| Linux | `.deb` | Debian package | Yes |
| Linux | `.rpm` | RPM package | Yes |
